description: Revamp AirTable for next meeting. Add topic clusters, themes, cluster descriptions, funnel state, tags for each topic. Improve content strategy overview.
Review customer list. Identify high domain authority customers for potential backlink outreach campaign.
Increase article refresh rate to 10/week starting next week. Include both new & existing articles in V2 refresher process.
Follow up via Slack w/ details on programmatic SEO ideas (directories of industry people, product use cases). Provide context & guiding thoughts for ideation/enablement.
